describe_how_to_group_results_e_g_by: Describe how to group results (e.g., "by record type and name")...

describe_the_start_time_e_g_last_7: Describe the start time (e.g., "last 7 days", "since January 1st")...

describe_what_to_measure_e_g_query_count: Describe what to measure (e.g., "query counts and response times")...
